statement: A 5 kg block rests on a frictionless horizontal table. It is connected by a horizontal rope to a 3 kg block hanging over the edge via a frictionless massless pulley. Find the acceleration of the system and the rope tension when released from rest. Use g = 9.81 m/s².
common_student_errors: Including the weight of the table block in the net driving force (only the hanging weight drives the system)
Using the total weight (5+3)·g as the driving force instead of just the hanging weight 3·g
Setting up separate accelerations for the two blocks instead of using the kinematic constraint that they are equal
